name: api-and-interface-design
tagline: Design guidance for stable, hard-to-misuse APIs and module interfaces — Hyrum's Law, consistent error semantics, boundary validation.
verdict: Clear, example-rich, internally consistent design guidance with concrete code samples for every pattern it prescribes and no security-relevant behavior at all; it only lacks explicit out-of-scope guidance and any version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere in the description or body.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
